expertAssessments.rationale: Core routes, dashboard modal pack, AI sidebar, fullscreen workspace, and API probes were validated in one production browser session.
The warning-card AI path returned grounded CPU warning analysis, and the carried conversation preserved trace/tool/time-range parity after fullscreen handoff.
The repeated next/font preload warnings seen in QA-20260417-0299 no longer appeared on dashboard or fullscreen AI routes, and console remained clean across the release-facing pass.
Production deployment dpl_sRuuaBX32ZL4rGggN552bJqcL2th stayed healthy, API health/version endpoints matched v8.11.17, and Vercel usage stayed within the expected budget envelope.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed after production QA; effective usage 9.7924 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 9135. No unexpected usage spike was observed.

completedImprovements.title: Suppress repeated root font preload warnings on dashboard and fullscreen AI routes

notes: root-layout-font-preload-cleanup completed in production on v8.11.17; this run supersedes QA-20260417-0299 as the latest broad reference.

exploratory follow-up during this session found that the active-alert modal path still prefills host:port text while the warning-card CTA uses a normalized server name; a local normalization patch was prepared separately from this production QA record.
